function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_17__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest three invoices linked to the tax-firm client.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed successfully; attachments were ordered newest-first (2026-02-17, 2026-01-19, 2025-12-18), recipient matches canonical Miles email, and subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with grounding references
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to take care of next inbox message. I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity against canonical entity email, identified the tax-firm client context via Helios/Claudia records, read source invoice contents, drafted a reply email with the three oldest linked invoices attached (ordered newest-first per hard outbox rule), then deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: exactly 3 requested invoices were handled (INV-0006, INV-0007, INV-0008).
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request and removed the handled inbox file.

function.message: Completed the next inbox item: prepared a reply draft to Miles with the requested three linked tax-firm client invoices attached, and cleared the processed inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inbox workflow, structured inbox-email metadata rules, canonical entity email verification, invoice-lane exactness, one-shot outbox write discipline, and post-completion inbox deletion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested oldest 3 invoices linked to the tax-firm client. Sender `miles@novak.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/miles.md`. Helios client linkage was evidenced in `10_entities/cast/claudia.md` and Helios project context. The three oldest linked Helios invoices were read directly (INV-0006, INV-0007, INV-0008) and used as attachments in the outbound draft, then the processed inbox file was deleted.
